role: Central requirement authority — validates PRD output, formalizes into TRD specs, ensures full traceability

requirement_extraction.description: Parse PRD features into atomic, testable requirement statements

tools.Doorstop: Python-based requirements management, stores YAML alongside code in Git
tools.Strictdoc: Open-source requirements management with bidirectional traceability
tools.Pydantic_v2: Requirement schema validation and hierarchical modeling

traceability_management.description: Maintain full forward and backward traceability

tools.Doorstop: Bidirectional linking: PRD → TRD → Task → Test
tools.SQLModel_SQLite: Lightweight relational store for Requirement Traceability Matrix
tools.NetworkX: Dependency graph queries and impact analysis

traceability_management.method: RTM (Requirement Traceability Matrix) — forward tracing (requirement→code) and backward tracing (code→requirement)

feasibility_assessment.description: Flag requirements that conflict with tech constraints or timelines

tools.Claude_API: Analyze requirement complexity against tech stack capabilities

tools.openapi_diff: Detect contract mismatches between what backend provides and Flutter expects
tools.NetworkX: Cross-reference dependency graphs for circular or conflicting requirements

prioritization.method: Must/Should/Could/Won't with weighted scoring (business impact x urgency x dependency count)

acceptance_criteria_generation.description: Generate measurable acceptance criteria for every requirement

tools.Claude_API: Generate Gherkin-style acceptance criteria from requirement descriptions

change_impact_analysis.description: When a requirement changes, identify all affected downstream artifacts

tools.NetworkX: Graph traversal to find all impacted tasks, tests, and models
tools.Doorstop: Bidirectional link traversal for impact radius

requirement_state_machine.transitions: Only Root_Requirement_Agent can move to Approved
